\section*{LING Branch Successor Pilot}

\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{LING Branch Successor Pilot}



This generated packet is an L2 branch-pilot shell. It is not a supersession of the canonical LING Branch Book. It tests the zero-frontier case: the branch preserves contrast, recursion, and context-response closure without claiming full reference recovery.

Computed LING posture: \textbf{conditional-cert-close}. The REF-INVIS/RECOV frontier remains active and is intentionally preserved in this pilot.
